Cameron feels unusual, but not precisely unsuccessful. Remarkable score and effective melodrama. Overhyped is the correct adjective, since it is far from being the best filmic adaptation of the story, and not the first to add moving romance to the formula. Nonetheless, it is a surprising effort.76/100
